studios.heading: IF YOU ARE A NAIL STUDIO, WE HAVE A SUPER OFFER FOR YOU!
studios.heroTitle: AMERICAN CREATOR DREAMS OF JOINING YOUR TEAM, SPECIFICALLY IN THE MATERIALS YOU USE TO CREATE BEAUTY AND DELIGHT YOUR CLIENTS.
studios.heroDesc: We work quickly, use proven courier and transport companies, and carefully monitor the availability of all products in stock.
studios.guarantee: We guarantee the quality of our brand's materials
studios.certsTitle: WE HAVE CERTIFICATES AND DECLARATIONS OF CONFORMITY FROM ALL LEADING COUNTRIES WORLDWIDE:

studios.cert2: Voluntary Cosmetic Registration Program FDA – United States of America

studios.discountFixedNote: The discount is fixed and applies to all orders regardless of amount
studios.discount4Note: The discount will apply to all products in this order
studios.vipText: You will also receive a permanent VIP partner certificate with a 20% discount on all products and 30% on Color Gel and Disguise Collection

delivery.title: DELIVERY AND PAYMENT TERMS
delivery.desc: Orders are shipped via courier service. Our online store offers several delivery options:
delivery.cityNote1: Courier delivery in the city on the next day.
delivery.cityNote2Line1: Your order will be delivered the next day if you pay before 17:00 on the current day.
delivery.paymentDesc: We accept payment cards: VISA, MasterCard WorldWide, MIR. To pay by bank card when placing an order, select the payment method: bank card.
delivery.cardStepsTitle: When paying by bank card, payment is processed on the bank's authorization page where you must enter your bank card details:
contacts.title: CONTACTS
contacts.formSubtitle: Our manager will contact you within 24 hours
contacts.successMsg: Message sent! We will get in touch.
contacts.errorMsg: Sending error. Please try again later.
contacts.legalLine2: Kommunarka village, Aleksandry Monakhovoy St., 88, bldg. 2, apt. 366
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q0: How is delivery to regions handled?
faq.a0: Our store's products are delivered to customers by transport companies.
faq.q1: Is self-pickup of an ordered item possible?
faq.a1: For your convenience we only use delivery services! Self-pickup is not possible – delivery only! Thank you for your understanding!
faq.q2: How do I calculate delivery cost to a specific city?
faq.a2: For an accurate calculation of your order delivery cost, contact our call center operators or ask via online chat.
faq.q3: What are the phone support hours?
faq.a3: Our operators work from 9:00 to 18:00 on weekdays.
partners.title: HOW TO BECOME A PARTNER
partners.intro: To become our partner — fill out the form depending on the type of partnership. Within a few days we will contact you to discuss further cooperation.
partners.responseTime: We will respond within a few business days
